title: rubus × angustiracemosus
intro: Rubus × angustiracemosus is a hybrid plant species, derived from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus, commonly known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry rose. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × angustiracemosus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
